title: Japanese Kadhai Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Japanese-inspired rice bowl dish made with kadhai-spiced chicken, crispy vegetables, and fragrant floral notes.
instructions: 1. Cook the Japanese rice according to package instructions.
2. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of floral sesame oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the kadhai masala and cook for an additional 1 minute.
5. Add the crisp lettuce and red bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
6. To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom of a bowl.
7. Add the chicken and vegetable mixture on top of the rice.
8. Garnish with green onions and a drizzle of floral sesame oil.
